---
title: "`r paste('Fact Sheet:', input$disease_fsheet, '-',input$id_country_factsheet,'-',input$factsheet_imingInput[2])`"
output: pdf_document
resource_files:
- app.R
- modules/filter_dataset.R
- dataset.R
- dependencies.R
theme: journal
prettydoc::html_pretty:
    theme: leonids
    highlight: github


---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}




```


```{css echo=FALSE}
/* Layout */
.columns {
  display: flex;
}
.col2 {
  columns: 2 200px;
  -webkit-columns: 2 200px;
  -moz-columns: 2 200px;
}
.col3 {
  columns: 3 100px;
  -webkit-columns: 3 100px;
  -moz-columns: 3 100px;
}

/* Typography */
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, p {
  font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
}
h1 {
  color: #1E3A8A; /* deep blue */
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
h1.title {
  font-size: 22px;
  color: #0F172A; /* navy */
}
h2 {
  font-size: 18px;
  color: #1E40AF; /* emerald green */
  font-weight: 600;
}
h3 {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: #1E40AF; /* royal blue */
  font-weight: 500;
}
h4 {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #374151; /* neutral gray */
}
p {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #111827; /* dark gray */
}
.emphasized {
  font-size: 1.2em;
  color: #DC2626; /* red accent */
}

/* Body */
body {
  background-color: #FFFFFF;
  font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
  color: #333333;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}


/* Infobox styles */
.infobox {
  padding: 1em 1em 1em 4em;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  border: 2px solid #0093D0; /* amber */
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #E6F2FA 5px center/3em no-repeat;
}


.infobox h2 {
  color: #0093D0; /* WHO blue for headings */
  font-weight: 600;
}
.infobox p {
  color: #1F4E79;
}


.caution {
  background-image: url("www/logowho.png");
}

/* Flag icon */
.flag-icon {
  float: right;
  padding: 10px;
}

/* Shiny frame */
.shiny-frame {
  height: 800px;
}

/* Tables */
table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 13px;
}
table th {
  background-color: #F3F4F6;
  color: #111827;
  padding: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #D1D5DB;
}
table td {
  padding: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #D1D5DB;
}
table tr:hover {
  background-color: #E5E7EB;
}

/* Buttons */
.btn-primary {
  background-color: #2563EB; /* bright blue */
  color: #FFFFFF;
  border: none;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.btn-primary:hover {
  background-color: #1E40AF; /* darker blue */
}


```


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Pull the necessary libraries

library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(labelled)
library(kableExtra)
library(tinytex)
library(webshot)
library(latexpdf)
library(latticeExtra)
library(patchwork)   # pour combiner les graphiques
library(htmlwidgets) # utile pour highcharter



```


```{r echo=FALSE , warning=FALSE}
# import data from app.R
title_name_report_mrkdown_txt<-title_name_report_mrkdown()
#subtitle_name_report_mrkdown_tx<-subtitle_name_report_mrkdown()
colors_pals=c("green","#4393C3","#2166AC","#D6604D","darkorange","#B2182B")
geo_level<-country_name_report_mrkdown()

# Pipeline commun
# data_all <- tvd_last_r1_factsheet() %>%
#   select(indicator_code, year_api, numeric_value) %>%
#   rbind(tvd_first_r1_factsheet() %>% select(indicator_code, year_api, numeric_value)) %>%
#   group_by(indicator_code, year_api) %>%
#   summarise(numeric_value = round(mean(numeric_value, na.rm = TRUE), 0), .groups = "drop") %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   arrange(desc(numeric_value)) %>%
#   left_join(tvd_indicator %>% select(indicator_code, indicator, category_indicator),
#             by = c("indicator_code" = "indicator_code"))


```




::: {.infobox .caution data-latex="{caution}"}

#  `r title_name_report_mrkdown_txt` 

**Print:**  `r Sys.Date()`

This Epidemiologique situation provides a brief overview of the results of the **TVD program** indicators at the  `r geo_level` . For more details on using _AFRO/DPC/TVD Dashboard_ see <https://tvdindicator.shinyapps.io/tvdforecasting/>.

:::



## 1- Overview of the data analyzed in this fact sheet

:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,fig.show='asis', fig.height=4, fig.width=4}

tmap_mode("plot")

# Vérification avant d'appeler la fonction
 tryCatch(
   {fct3_data_map_facsheet(a=tvd_disease_r2_factsheet())
   }, error = function(e) {
        # Gestion des erreurs globales
        showNotification(paste("Error during chart generation :", e$message),
                         type = "error")
        return(NULL)  # évite le blocage de l’application
      })



# Vérification avant d'appeler la fonction
#if (!is.null(tvd_disease_r2_factsheet()) && nrow(tvd_disease_r2_factsheet()) > 0) {
#  fct3_data_map_facsheet(a = tvd_disease_r2_factsheet())
#} else {
#  cat("⚠️ Données indisponibles pour générer la carte.\n")
#}
   

```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}



```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}


 tryCatch(
   {fct2_data_map_facsheet(a=tvd_disease_r2_factsheet())
   }, error = function(e) {
        # Gestion des erreurs globales
        showNotification(paste("Error during chart generation :", e$message),
                         type = "error")
        return(NULL)  # évite le blocage de l’application
      })

 #if (!is.null(tvd_disease_r2_factsheet()) && nrow(tvd_disease_r2_factsheet()) > 0) {
 # fct2_data_map_facsheet(a = tvd_disease_r2_factsheet())
#} else {
#  cat("⚠️ Données indisponibles pour générer le tableau résumé.\n")
#}




```

:::
::::::::::::::



:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5, class.output="bg-success"}



```


:::
::::::::::::::

\newpage

```{r results = 'asis' , echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}




```
\newline

\newpage

## 2- Data Sources

:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="100%"}

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}



```

:::
::: {.column width="100%"}



```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

  

```

:::
::::::::::::::





```{r results = 'asis' , echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="40%", out.width="80%"}


 tryCatch(
   {fct4_data_map_facsheet(a=tvd_disease_r1_factsheet())
   }, error = function(e) {
        # Gestion des erreurs globales
        showNotification(paste("Error during chart generation :", e$message),
                         type = "error")
        return(NULL)  # évite le blocage de l’application
      })



     

```


:::::: {.cols data-latex=""}
::: {.col data-latex="{0.5\textwidth}"}

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```
:::

::: {.col data-latex="{0.5\textwidth}"}

:::
::::::





:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="100%"}

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```

:::
::: {.column width="100%"}


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```


:::
::::::::::::::



\newpage

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}




```

\newline
\newline



```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}




```
\newline

\newpage

## 3- Trends Related to Morbidity, Mortality and Health service coverage 


:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r line-chart, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, echo=FALSE}


```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```



:::
::::::::::::::



```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=12, out.width='100%'}

# Préparation des données regroupées par catégorie
# Préparation des données avec conditions
data_heat <- tryCatch({
  df_last  <- tvd_last_r1_factsheet()
  df_first <- tvd_first_r1_factsheet()
  
  # Vérifie que les deux datasets existent et contiennent les colonnes nécessaires
  required_cols <- c("indicator_code", "year_api", "numeric_value")
  if (is.null(df_last) || is.null(df_first) ||
      !all(required_cols %in% names(df_last)) ||
      !all(required_cols %in% names(df_first))) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  df_last %>%
    select(indicator_code, year_api, numeric_value) %>%
    rbind(df_first %>% select(indicator_code, year_api, numeric_value)) %>%
    group_by(indicator_code, year_api) %>%
    summarise(
      numeric_value = if (all(is.na(numeric_value))) NA_real_ else round(mean(numeric_value, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(
      tvd_indicator %>% select(indicator_code, indicator, category_indicator),
      by = "indicator_code"
    ) %>%
    filter(category_indicator %in% c("Prevalence","Incidence","Death","Strategy")) %>%
    arrange(category_indicator, indicator, year_api)
}, error = function(e) {
  showNotification(paste("⚠️ Erreur lors de la préparation des données :", e$message), type = "error")
  NULL
})

# Création de la heatmap avec palette vert → jaune → rouge
if (!is.null(data_heat) && nrow(data_heat) > 0) {
  hchart(
    data_heat,
    "heatmap",
    hcaes(
      x = year_api,
      y = paste(category_indicator, indicator, sep = " - "),
      value = numeric_value
    )
  ) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste(geo_level, ": Heatmap des indicateurs par catégorie")) %>%
    hc_subtitle(text = "Comparaison par année et indicateur") %>%
    hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Année")) %>%
    hc_yAxis(
      title = list(text = "Catégorie - Indicateur"),
      categories = unique(paste(data_heat$category_indicator, data_heat$indicator, sep = " - "))
    ) %>%
    hc_colorAxis(stops = color_stops(colors = c("green","yellow","orange","red"))) %>%
    hc_tooltip(pointFormat = "Valeur: <b>{point.value}</b>") %>%
    hc_plotOptions(series = list(
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.value}",
        color = "black"
      )
    )) %>%
    hc_add_theme(hc_theme_smpl()) %>%
    hc_chart(backgroundColor = "transparent") %>%
    hc_exporting(enabled = TRUE)
} else {
  p("⚠️ Aucune donnée trouvée pour ces catégories. Vérifie l'orthographe des noms ou la disponibilité des données.")
}



```


```{r  echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}
# df <- data2_perf_indi_prevalence()

# Colonnes attendues
# Vérifie que l'objet existe
# if (is.null(df)) {
#   p("⚠️ Les données sont absentes.")
# } else if (nrow(df) == 0) {
#   p("⚠️ Le dataset est vide.")
# } else if (!all(required_cols %in% names(df))) {
#  missing <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
#  p(paste("⚠️ Colonnes manquantes :", paste(missing, collapse = ", ")))
#} else {
  # Toutes les conditions sont OK → exécuter le graphique
 #  hchart(
 #    df,
#     "column",
#     hcaes(country, value, group = group_value),
#     dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = '{point.performance:.1f}')
#   ) %>%
 #    hc_colors(colors_pal) %>%
#     hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "")) %>%
#     hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "")) %>%
#     hc_exporting(enabled = TRUE) %>%
#     hc_tooltip(
#       crosshairs = TRUE,
#       backgroundColor = "#FCFFC5",
#       shared = TRUE,
#       borderWidth = 2
#     ) %>%
 #    hc_title(
 #      text = paste(
 #        "Number of indicators that recorded a reduction in frequency between",
 #        if (all(is.na(tvd_first_r1_factsheet()$year_api))) NA else # # min(tvd_first_r1_factsheet()$year_api, na.rm = TRUE),
#        " and ",
#        if (all(is.na(tvd_last_r1_factsheet()$year_api))) NA else max(tvd_last_r1_factsheet()$year_api, na.rm = TRUE),
 #       "-",
 #       country_name_report_mrkdown()
 #     ),
 #     align = "center"
 #   ) %>%
 #   hc_subtitle(text = "", align = "center") %>%
 #   hc_add_theme(hc_theme_smpl()) %>%
 #   hc_credits(
 #     enabled = TRUE,
 #     text = "Data Source: WHO/AFRO/DPC/TVD Programme",
 #     style = list(fontSize = "10px")
 #   )
#}


```



```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, out.width='100%'}



 tryCatch(
   {fct3b_group_facsheet(a=tvd_factsheet_r())
   }, error = function(e) {
        # Gestion des erreurs globales
        showNotification(paste("Error during chart generation :", e$message),
                         type = "error")
        return(NULL)  # évite le blocage de l’application
      })

#fct2b_group_facsheet(a=tvd_first_Last_factsheet())
 
# fct_progress_view(a=tvd_first_Last_factsheet(),
#                          b=paste("Indicator Results for" #,unique(tvd_first_Last_factsheet()$Dimension) ," and Value Differences Between Current Estimates #and Baseline "," in the period from ",min(tvd_first_Last_factsheet()$year_api)," to", #max(tvd_first_Last_factsheet()$year_api)," - ","AFRO"), 
#                          c="Note Green indicates positive progress toward targets compared with #baseline values, while brown indicates negative progress toward targets compared with baseline #values.")%>%
#          htmltools_value()
  
  



```



```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, facettes, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, out.width='100%'}



# Exemple de données
#data <- data.frame(
#  categorie = rep(c("Prévalence", "Incidence", "Death", "Stratégie"), each = 10),
#  valeur = runif(40, 1, 100),
#  temps = rep(1:10, 4)
#)

# Graphique avec facettes
#ggplot(data, aes(x = temps, y = valeur, color = categorie)) +
#  geom_line(show.legend = FALSE) +
#  facet_wrap(~categorie, ncol = 2) +
#  ggtitle("Indicateurs par catégorie") +
#  theme_minimal()



```


:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}


:::
::: {.column width="50%"}



:::
::::::::::::::



\newpage

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}




```





:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,fig.show='asis', fig.height=4, fig.width=4}




```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}

     

```



:::
::::::::::::::






```{r results = 'asis' , echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="40%", out.width="50%"}



      

```





:::::::::::::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```


:::
::::::::::::::





```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=5}



```





```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}




```


\newline
\newline

\newpage

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.height="90%", out.width="100%"}




```




```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
#tmap_arrange(tmap_sdg_indicators,tmap_sdg_indicators_africa,nrow = 1)
```
\newline

\newpage




\newline

\newpage

### 3- Forecast Relative to Targets


\newline

\newpage




\newline

\newpage





Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
